auth_twoFactor_description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth_twoFactor_recoveryDescription: Enter one of your recovery codes to sign in.
settings_twoFactor_description: Add an extra layer of security to your account using an authenticator app.
settings_twoFactor_setupDescription: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to verify.
settings_twoFactor_scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
settings_twoFactor_verifyCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
settings_twoFactor_setupError: Failed to set up two-factor authentication
settings_twoFactor_recoveryCodesDescript: Store these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once. If you lose access to your authenticator app, you can use these codes to sign in.
settings_twoFactor_disableDescription: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication. This will make your account less secure.
settings_twoFactor_regenerateDescription: Enter your password to generate new recovery codes. Your old codes will no longer work.
admin_userDetail_disable2faConfirmDescri: This will disable two-factor authentication for this user, invalidate their authenticator app, and revoke all active sessions. The user will need to set up 2FA again if they want to re-enable it.
